~~~

Here's a full breakdown:

---

**🌐 Does it reach out to the internet?**
**No.** There are no URLs, download commands, `Invoke-WebRequest`, `curl`, `wget`, or any network calls in this file. All operations are purely local. The file was generated by the web tool at `schneegans.de` (noted in a comment), but the file itself makes no internet connections during installation.

---

**📋 Changes Made to the Windows Installation**

| Category | Change |
|---|---|
| **Edition** | Installs **Windows 11 Pro** using a generic/KMS product key |
| **Language & Region** | UI, system, and input locale set to **en-US**; timezone set to **Eastern Standard Time** |
| **Hardware Bypass** | Bypasses TPM, Secure Boot, and RAM requirement checks (allows install on unsupported hardware) |
| **OOBE (Setup Experience)** | Skips EULA page, hides wireless setup, hides Microsoft account login screen, disables Express Settings |
| **Privacy / Express Settings** | All express settings (telemetry, etc.) disabled (`ProtectYourPC=3`) |
| **Taskbar** | Search set to icon-only; taskbar aligned **left** (not centered); widgets disabled |
| **Start Menu** | Start menu pinned items cleared (empty pinned list) |
| **Wallpaper** | Solid color wallpaper set to **dark teal `#011313`** |
| **Visual Effects** | All animations and visual effects **disabled** (performance mode) — shadows, thumbnails, transitions, etc. |
| **Sticky Keys** | Sticky Keys shortcut **disabled** |
| **Password Expiration** | Set to **unlimited** (passwords never expire) |
| **Auto Restart Sign-On** | Disabled (Windows won't auto-sign-in after a restart/update) |
| **Bing Search in Taskbar** | Disabled (no web results in Start search) |
| **OneDrive** | Setup files and shortcuts **removed**; RunOnce registry entry deleted |
| **Copilot** | Fully removed (both app package and policy key) |
| **Widgets** | Disabled via policy |
| **Microsoft Edge** | First-run experience hidden; startup boost and background mode disabled |
| **Chat/Teams Auto-Install** | Blocked via registry |
| **News & Interests** | Disabled via policy |
| **Consumer Features / App Suggestions** | All `ContentDeliveryManager` flags disabled (no suggested/silent app installs) |
| **GameDVR** | App capture disabled |
| **Game DVR / Xbox** | All Xbox apps removed (see below) |
| **Filesystem ACL** | Removes "Authenticated Users" (`S-1-5-11`) write access to the C:\ drive root (security hardening) |
| **Cleanup on First Logon** | Deletes the unattend.xml and related setup scripts after installation completes |

---

**🗑️ Apps & Features Removed**

| Type | Items Removed |
|---|---|
| **Appx Packages** | 3D Viewer, Bing Search, Clipchamp, Clock, Copilot, Cortana, Dev Home, Family Safety, Feedback Hub, Get Help, Get Started, Mail & Calendar, Maps, Mixed Reality Portal, Movies & TV, News, Office Hub, OneDrive, OneNote, Outlook, Paint 3D, People, Power Automate, Quick Assist, Skype, Snipping Tool, Solitaire, Sticky Notes, Teams (both versions), To Do, Voice Recorder, Wallet, Weather, Windows Terminal, Xbox (all), Your Phone |
| **Windows Capabilities** | Fax & Scan, Internet Explorer, Math Recognizer, OneSync, OpenSSH Client, PowerShell ISE, Quick Assist, Snipping Tool, Steps Recorder, Windows Hello Face, Windows Media Player, WordPad |
| **Optional Features** | Media Playback, PowerShell v2, Remote Desktop Connection client, Recall (AI feature), Snipping Tool |


~~~
